steps.prompt: Research market compensation and role benchmarks for a {role_title} in the {department} department. Find: salary ranges by seniority level and geography, in-demand skills and qualifications, typical career progression, common interview formats used in the industry, and competing employer positioning. Cite sources.

Using role-benchmarks.md, write a job posting and define the full interview process for a {role_title} in {department}. Job posting should include: compelling role summary, key responsibilities (5-7 bullets), required and preferred qualifications, compensation range (use benchmark data), and a clear apply CTA. Interview process should define: number of rounds, format of each round (screen, technical, panel, etc.), who conducts each round, and timeline from application to offer. Flag any legal considerations (EEO language, salary transparency requirements).

checkpoint_config.message: Review job-posting.md including the job description and interview process definition. Approve to proceed to interview design.

steps.prompt: Design a structured interview kit for the {role_title} role in {department}. Use job-posting.md for context. Create: a competency matrix mapping key skills to interview rounds, 5-7 behavioral questions per round with STAR scoring rubrics, technical/role-specific questions with model answers and evaluation criteria, a scoring rubric (1-5 scale with anchors), red flags to screen for, and a debrief agenda template. Ensure the process is consistent and defensible against bias claims.

Create a 30-60-90 day onboarding checklist for a new {role_title} in {department}. Include: pre-start tasks (accounts, equipment, introductions), day-1 agenda, first-week schedule, 30-day success milestones, 60-day ramp expectations, 90-day full-productivity targets, key stakeholders to meet, required training and certifications, and manager check-in cadence. Make it specific to the role context.

checkpoint_config.message: Review the complete hiring pipeline: job-posting.md, interview-kit.md, and onboarding-checklist.md. Approve to publish the role and begin sourcing.
